Public Health Advisory Board - Nurse Family PartnershipⓇ (NFP) Subcommittee | Shasta County CA
Toggle Menu
Public Health Advisory Board - Nurse Family PartnershipⓇ (NFP) Subcommittee
About the Subcommittee
Nurse-Family Partnership® is a free home visiting program that pairs nurses with first-time moms early in their pregnancy.
The Public Health Advisory Board Nurse-Family Partnership® (NFP) Subcommittee works to make sure the program meets the needs of the people it serves.
The subcommittee:
Advises Shasta County Health and Human Services on program needs
Helps build and maintain referral networks and community partnerships
Advocates for community needs
Learn more about the NFP® program on the Shasta County Nurse-Family Partnership® webpage
.
UPCOMING MEETING
Friday, March 27, 2026
10:30 a.m. to noon
Mae Helene Bacon Boggs Conference Center
2420 Breslauer Way, Redding
PUBLIC COMMENT
To address the Board during Public Comment Time:
The speaker should approach the table and, after receiving recognition from the Chair, give their name and affiliation prior to comments or questions. Sixteen (16) copies of any written material used in the presentation must be provided to the clerk. There is a three-minute limit to an individual’s comments, and the speaker may defer comments to a specific agenda item. Pursuant to the Brown Act, action or Board discussion cannot be taken on open time matters other than to receive comments.
AGENDAS & MINUTES
To access agendas and minutes prior to 2023, call (530) 225-5591.
